subcodes.first_line: In this very hour hath been sent down the Decree of God, firm and mighty. Rejoice, O Earth, for God hath adorned thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزل فی هذا الحین امر الله المحکم المتین یا ارض قرت عیناک بما زینک الله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
